title: ctenitis equestris
intro: Ctenitis equestris, also known as Horse's Tail Tree Fern, is a species of tree fern native to tropical regions of Asia, characterized by its tall, slender stem and feathery fronds. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various ailments. The health benefits of Ctenitis equestris include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
